Appropriation [No. 19 of 1988 59
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 19 of 1988
Date of Assent: 18th April, 1988
An Act to authorise expenditure from1Tthe general
revenues of the Republic of moneys required for the
services of the Republic during the financial year
ending on the 31st December, 1988, not exceeding in the
aggregate five thousand nine hundred and seventy-two
million, five hundred and eighty-two thousand, one
hundred and fifty-eighty kwacha.
[22nd April, 1988
ENACTED by tho Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
l. TbiRAct may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 1988. Shorttltle
2. (l) On tho authority of a warrant isaued by tho President, Appropr1a­
there may be exponded from the general revonues of the tlon
Republic such moneys, not oxceed.ing in the aggregate five
thousand nine hundred and sovonty-two million, five hundrod
and eighty-two thousand, ono hunclrod and fifty-oight kwacha.,
as may be requirod for the services of tho Republic during the
financial year ending on the 31st December, 1988.
(2) The moneys mentionod in subsection (1) shall bo
a.ppropria.tod to the services of the Republic mentioned in the
second column of the Schodulo iu a.mou.nts not excoeding the
a.mounts indicated in the third column thereof.
(3) On the written authority of the Permanent Secretary,
Ministry of Finance, the amounts shown under the sub-hoods
of the estimates may be varied:
Provided that--
(i) the amounts appropriated to each Head sha.U not
thereby bo altered; and
(ii) any of the amounts shown wider Head 20/01 or 21
shall not ho varied.
Singl6 oopiea of this Act may be obtained from tho Government Printer'
P.O. Box 30130, Lusaka,. Price 60n.
